title: Putham Puthu Paattu Lyrics Thendral
stanzas:
Putham Puthu Paattu Song Lyrics From Thendral
#Vidyasagar #SPB #PupavnamKuppusamy

Vanakkam vanakkam vanakkam
naan vaazhum boomikku
Vanakkam irukko illaiyo
theriyaathu
oru velai irunthaa
Saamikkum vanakkam,

kuththa vechi
kooththu paakkum
ungalukku vanakkam

uchchiyila vanthu paakkum
nilaavukkum vanakkam

parambarai solli thantha
paatukkum thaan vanakkam
naan parai kotta tholu thantha
maattukkum thaan vanakkam,
Vanakkam vanakkam vanakkam

puththam puthu paattu vanthaa
thaandavakone
en raththam ellam thee pudikkum
thaandavakone,

thappeduthu adikkaiyile
thaandavakone
en neththiyile idi idikkum
thaandavakone,

paattu ennum sannal vazhi
thaandavakonae
en pazhaiya kaalam
theriyuthada
Thaandavakone (2)
puththam puthu

ye maatu vaala pudichi
maada kulam kadanthu
thaamara poo parichi
thanthaen ayya
en machinikku,

manji virattu kulla
mayila kaala adakki
thanga chain eduthu
thanthen ayya
en thangathukku,

en aanandhiku pudikkumunnu
aala mara ponthukkulle
aavyile pudicha kili
paathiyile paranthiruche,

en pachchakili
adhu parantha pinne
naan oththai kili
naala seththa kili

thanthana thanthana
thanthana thanthana
podu thanthana thanthana
thanthana thanthana
aahhh...aahh....
aahhhh..aahhh......

raaja talkiesukulla
ragasiyama naan kuthikka
paanji pudichaane
paalaiyaththaan.
andha rangasaamy,

nethu nenavaaga
naala kanavaaga
indru en kaaladiyil
nazhuvuthada
manam uruguthada,

vantha thethi sonnathundu
vaazhntha thethi nenjil undu
pogum thethi entha thethi
ooril yaarum sonnathunda,

pogum thethi en pol
kandaarunda
athai kandu konda naanum
kadavul thaanda,
Parai (6)

vilangu viratta pirantha parai
kai vilangu odikka
olikkum parai,

kadaisi thamizhan irukkum varai
kaathil olikkum pazhaiya parai,

veera parai vetri parai
porgal thudikkum
punitha parai,

kayiru katti kadalin alaiyai
niruththa mudiyuma,
viralai vetti paraiyin isaiyai
odukka mudiyuma,

ithu viduthalai isai
pudhu veeru kol isai
vettai aadi vaazhntha
engal paatanin isai...

En paattan muppaataangaloda
poi sera poren,
ippo naan marubadiyum amma
karba payileye paduthukitten,

ellarum ammavoda
vayithukulla irukkrappa
theriyumaame oru iruttu,

adhu ippo enakku theriyuthu
kadha kadhappa irukku,

naan marupadiyum poranthu
varuvenda,

pathiramaa paathukunga
en paraiyai,

en appanukkum aathaalukkum
thaandavakone,

en thappu saththam kettidumaa
thaandavakone....

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Putham Puthu Paattu?

The song celebrates new beginnings and the joy of life, conveying a message of positivity and togetherness.

What is the context of this song in the movie Thendral?

In Thendral, this song is featured during a festive celebration, highlighting the characters' happiness and unity.

Who are the singers of Putham Puthu Paattu?

The song is sung by the legendary SPB and Puspavanam Kuppusamy.

Who composed the music for Putham Puthu Paattu?

The music for this song was composed by Vidyasagar.

When was Putham Puthu Paattu released?

The song was released on February 6, 2004.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Putham Puthu Paattu, the joyous melody encapsulates the spirit of celebration and togetherness, making it a perfect anthem for festive occasions. The song's vibrant lyrics and upbeat rhythm evoke feelings of happiness and excitement, inviting listeners to join in the merriment. Featured in the movie Thendral, it plays a crucial role in showcasing the characters' joyful moments. With the enchanting voices of SPB and Puspavanam Kuppusamy, this track remains a beloved classic in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Putham Puthu Paattu from Thendral is a vibrant celebration of life and joy, beautifully rendered by the iconic voices of SPB and Puspavanam Kuppusamy. This song, composed by Vidyasagar, captures the essence of festivity and togetherness, making it a perfect addition to any celebration. Experience the infectious energy and uplifting vibes that make this track a timeless favorite!
stanzaMeanings: Greetings, greetings, greetings, I live in this world. Is there a greeting here? I don't know. If there is a job, greetings to it.
Greetings to you who dance and watch with joy.
Greetings to the moon that comes from above.
Greetings to the song that tells the stories of the past.
Greetings to the one who gives the song, greetings to the one who gives the drum.
Greetings, greetings, greetings.
A new song has come, the dance will burn all my blood, the dance will ignite it.
The dance will strike in the rhythm, it will hit my heart.
The song will lead the way, do you remember my old times? The dance will lead.
A new song.
What a word, holding on to the family, giving a lotus flower to my daughter.
In the trap of the net, I took the chain for my sister.
For my happiness, a bird was born in the house, it flew in the air.
My green bird flew away, then I caught another bird to keep it safe.
Thathana thanthana thanthana thanthana, let it go, thanthana thanthana thanthana thanthana, ahhh...ahh....ahhhh..ahhh......
In the Raja talkies, secretly I enjoyed the song, that Rangasamy.
Yesterday was a memory, today is a dream, my feet are trembling, my heart is melting.
There is a saying about the past, there is a feeling in the heart, which feeling did anyone say in the village?
The feeling that goes away, I found it like a god.
Drum (6)
The drum that was born with a sound, the drum that can be played with hands.
Until the last Tamil person is there, the old drum will still be played.
Brave drum, victorious drum, the pure drum that beats.
Can you stop the waves of the sea by tying a rope? Can you stop the music of the drum by cutting the fingers?
This is the music of freedom, a new drum, the music of our song that lives on...
I will go with my song and the thirty others, now I am singing again in my mother's womb.
Do you all know that everyone is in their mother's womb, in the darkness?
Now I know the story, it is a little dark.
I will not go again.
Please take care of my drum.
For my father and my mother, the dance will lead.
Will my mistake be heard? The dance will lead.
